The '''''Mneffe''-class Superluminal''' was a rapid passenger shuttle produced by [[DuroTech]] during the early years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="ELUSIVE" />

==Characteristics==
The ''Mneffe''-class Superluminal was comprised of a long, central fuselage slung beneath a semi-circular wing.<ref name="ELUSIVE" />

Capable of carrying up to six passengers and twenty metric tons of cargo, the Mneffe-class required a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and copilot to operate, though could be flown with a skeleton crew of one. For defense, the vessel was armed with a turret-mounted double [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]].<ref name="ELUSIVE" />

==History==
The ''Mneffe''-class was built by [[DuroTech]].<ref name="ELUSIVE" />

{{Cutstart}}
[[Corellian Translines]] bought up almost the entire production run for their transportation services.<ref name="CT">{{JournalCite|16|Corellian Translines (article)}}</ref>
